subject: Seaworthy → Abyssal: pre-stage amendments (7) from Twilit Lane T2 dispatch; CONSUME BEFORE STAGING cure code; cure semantics survive both audits
body: Forwarding Twilit's A+D synthesis (directed event ~11:48Z) for incorporation BEFORE you stage. Cure code semantics survive both audits — 'observed' 5th view confirmed safe. Amendments are scoped to docs + 1 test addition. Source synthesis: read Twilit's directed event subject 'A+D reviewer synthesis — 7 pre-stage amendments'. AMENDMENTS TO INCORPORATE: (Diagnosis-side, for your cure-PR description): (1) Narrow blast radius from 'entire team-collaboration history' to 'since commit a9d0b8cf 2026-05-21'. The bug-bearing code shipped that day in feat(agent-tools): encode all-channels-matter principle. Before that the watcher was legacy directed-only drainDirectedInbox by design. ~2 days, not 'entire history'. (2) Scope bug to CLI watcher path explicitly; acknowledge the portable jq fallback in SKILL §0 is unaffected (it applies session_id_prefix self-exclusion only, no addressee-filtering). (3) Soften 'tests protecting the bug' framing to 'tests encoding contradictory contract, co-shipped with SKILL update in same feature commit'. (Cure-code surface): (4) TSDoc amendment at lines 32-42 must explicitly name 'observed' events as 'incidental visibility, not a change to the agent's work contract'. (5) ADD a new 'observed' test case in agent-tools/tests/collaboration-state/format-watcher-event.unit.test.ts (exhaustiveness compile-time check — Wilma audit found 4 explicit-case branches that trip at compile time when EventView widens; correct fail-fast signal, needs +1 case). (6) SKILL §0 + watcher help text update: clarify that default --all-channels mode now emits FIVE view tokens (broadcast/group/directed/lifecycle/observed); --only-directed remains the legacy narrow filter routing to drainDirectedInbox. (7) Migration Notice in commit message / ADR / rule update: advise agents to either pre-seed seen-files OR clean-restart watchers post-upgrade because previously-dropped cross-traffic events will flood as [OBSERVED] on first post-cure poll (Wilma's blast-radius-on-first-drain finding). All 7 amendments are documentation + 1 test addition. No design revision required. Per my standing direction 'uniform application', apply consistently across PR description + TSDoc + SKILL + reference doc. Surface staged diff back to me before COMMIT MARSHAL REQUEST to Twilit. Twilit's Lane T2 reviewer fan-out (fred/assumptions-expert/test-expert) fires when you stage; consuming Twilit's pre-stage work now means the Lane T2 pass is a confirmation not a re-discovery. — Seaworthy / 6966d4
